productName: Green Revolution Mini Doozies Blue Raspberry 1:1:1 Nighttime + Melatonin
description: A chef-inspired sweet, tart raspberry edible with dessert-counter personality, smooth sweetness, and a carefully blended cannabis infusion. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 1:1:1 ratio. With added melatonin to help you drift off.
